name: User Registration
description: Allow new users to register with email, password, and name
acceptance_criteria: Return 201 with user profile on success

name: User Login
description: Authenticate user and return JWT access token
acceptance_criteria: Return JWT token on successful authentication
Token contains user_id in sub claim

name: Get Current User
description: Protected endpoint to retrieve current authenticated user profile
acceptance_criteria: Return 401 if token is missing or invalid

name: Health Checks
description: Liveness and readiness endpoints for monitoring

name: Exception Handling
description: Consistent error responses for all error scenarios
acceptance_criteria: All errors return JSON with status, error, message
500 errors do not expose stack traces

name: Request Logging
description: Log all HTTP requests with method, path, status, duration

name: Test Coverage
description: Comprehensive test suite for all authentication endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Test get current user with valid token
Test get current user without token
Test get current user with invalid token
